presentation.title: European Roulette
presentation.tagline: One wheel. One zero. Pure casino classic.
presentation.description: The timeless single-zero wheel — 37 pockets, 97.30% RTP, and every bet from a bold straight-up to the even-money outside. Place your chips and let it ride.

paragraphs: European Roulette is the purest form of the table classic: a single green zero, the numbers 1–36 in alternating red and black, and a polished wheel that decides it all in one spin. With only one zero, the house edge is just 2.70% — the friendliest odds on the casino floor.

Bet big or play it safe. Drop a chip straight onto a single number for a 35:1 thrill, or spread your stake across red/black, odd/even, the high or low half, the dozens or the columns for steady, even-money action. Combine as many bets as you like before every spin.
Every outcome is drawn by a certified server-side RNG and is fully auditable — the wheel you see is just for show, the result is locked in the instant you spin.

specs.label: Winning Functionality
values: Ball lands in one pocket; all covering bets pay
